name: Russ Savakus
abstract: Russell Savakus (May 13, 1925 – June 26, 1984) was an American session bass player (both electric and stand-up), violinist and singer. Savakus recorded with numerous artists in and around the 1960s folk and folk-rock movement in New York.

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: It was Dick Katz was playing piano, he was going, we became very friendly after that and Russ Savakus, bass player.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mandel Johnny — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
